spec.name: parallel_note_readers
spec.description: Spawn 6 parallel subagents, each reading one note file and returning its unguessable fact

subagent_config.intent: Read one research note file and return its exact content

objectives.goal: Read the assigned note file and return its exact content
objectives.success_criteria: The file content is read and returned verbatim

request.rationale: The objective explicitly states the breadth exceeds what I can process alone within my iteration budget (7 remaining). The CORRECT move is to delegate to parallel helper agents via the harness. 6 subagents will each read one note file in parallel, returning all facts in a single step.

subagent.task: The objective explicitly states the breadth exceeds what I can process alone within my iteration budget (7 remaining). The CORRECT move is to delegate to parallel helper agents via the harness. 6 subagents will each read one note file in parallel, returning all facts in a single step.
